title: Mary Franklin
compiled_truth: Mary Franklin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2001-06-05), Mary Franklin sent 5 and received 177 emails, totalling 182 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (5), [Wade Price](people/wade-price) (2), [Gloria Barkowsky](people/gloria-barkowsky) (1), [Angie Zeman](people/angie-zeman) (1), [Sherry Anastas](people/sherry-anastas) (1).
